category_scores.rationale: The method is well controlled, but the manuscript claim exceeds the validated readout.

central_claim_dependency_map.claim: The method proves a general mechanism across systems.
central_claim_dependency_map.decisive_evidence_needed: Independent system-level validation with positive and negative controls.
central_claim_dependency_map.fragile_assumption: The local SOP readout generalizes beyond the tested system.

decisive_evidence_thresholds.support_condition: Independent validation supports the same mechanism in a second system.
decisive_evidence_thresholds.weakening_or_refuting_condition: The second system fails or shows a conflicting mechanism.
decisive_evidence_thresholds.claim_narrowing_condition: The result supports only the tested local system.

failure_conditions.condition: No independent validation for a general mechanism claim.
failure_conditions.can_be_resolved_by: Add independent validation or narrow the claim.

prohibited_post_hoc_standard_shifts: Do not replace independent validation with rhetorical narrowing after scoring.

claim_maturity_gate.evidence_basis: Local SOP readout is controlled, but independent generalization is absent.
claim_maturity_gate.maturity_upgrade_readout: Independent validation supports the same mechanism in a second system.
claim_maturity_gate.required_narrowing: Claim only the tested local system if validation is absent.

field_evidence_map: C1 depends on R1 and independent validation.

issues.title: General mechanism claim exceeds validated readout
issues.specific_problem: The manuscript presents a broad mechanism claim from a locally validated protocol readout.
issues.why_serious_or_important: This threatens the central interpretation because local method validity does not establish generality.
issues.manuscript_evidence: The figures show only the tested local system.
issues.impact: The broad mechanism claim remains unsupported without independent validation.
issues.alternative_explanation_or_loophole: A system-specific effect could explain the observed readout.
issues.resolution: Add independent validation or narrow the claim to the tested system.
issues.decisive_readout: A second-system result supports the claim; a failed or divergent result weakens/refutes it.

revision_actions: Add independent validation or narrow the claim.
